html.p: Description: This model was built with CarveMe version 1.5.1

reaction.name: 2 5 diketo D gluconate transport via proton symport reversible periplasm
2 5 diketo D gluconate transport via diffusion extracellular to periplasm
LalaDgluMdap (tripeptide) transport via diffusion (extracellular to periplasm)
Trans-4-Hydroxy-L-proline transport (transport mechanism unknown - evidence from biolog data)
LalaDgluMdapDala (pentapeptide) transport via diffusion (extracellular to periplasm)
5-Dehydro-D-gluconate transport (transport mechanism unknown - evidence from biolog data)
5 Methylthio D ribose transport inout via proton symport
N-Acetyl-D-glucosamine 1-phosphate transport (transport mechanism unknown - evidence from biolog data)
Aminoimidazole riboside transport via diffusion extracellular to periplasm
D-alanyl-D-alanine (DalaDala) transport via diffusion (extracellular to periplasm)
L-arginine transport via diffusion (extracellular to periplasm)
ATP synthase (four protons for one ATP) (periplasm)
Beta alanyl L leucine transport via ABC system periplasm
L Histidinylglycine transport via diffusion extracellular to periplasm
L-Cysteinylglycine transport via diffusion (extracellular to periplasm)
Chorismate transport inout via proton symport
CMP transport inout via proton symport
CO2 transport via diffusion (extracellular to periplasm)
Cobalt (Co+2) transport out via proton antiport (periplasm)
Cobalt (Co+2) transport via diffusion (extracellular to periplasm)
Cobalt (Co+2) transport via diffusion (extracellular to cytoplasm)
Co transport via diffusion (extracellular to periplasm)
L cystine transport via ABC system
Cytochrome c oxidase aa3 2 protons1 electron periplasm
Co transport via diffusion (periplasm to cytosol)
D-alanine transport via ABC peptide transporter
Deoxycytidine transport in via proton symport
Dipeptide transport via ABC system cgly
Dipeptide transport via ABC system gly asn
DTMP transport inout via proton symport
Iron (Fe+2) transport out via proton antiport (periplasm)
Iron (II) transport via diffusion (extracellular to periplasm)
Ferripyoverdine complex formation P putida KT2440 specific
Copper transport out via proton antiport
Formate transport in via proton symport
Formate transport via proton symport (uptake only, periplasm)
Formate transport via diffusion (cytoplasm to periplasm)
Fumarate reductase / succinate dehydrogenase (irreversible) (periplasmic, membrane potential dissipating)
Glycerophosphserine transport via diffusion (extracellular to periplasm)
Glutarate reversible transport via symport periplasm
Glutarate transport via diffusion extracellular to periplasm
Glycerol-3-phosphate transport via diffusion (extracellular to periplasm)
H2O transport via diffusion (extracellular to periplasm)
Bicarbonate transport via diffusion (extracellular to periplasm)
Mercury (Hg+2) transport out via proton antiport (periplasm)
Mercury Hg2 transport via diffusion periplasm to cytoplasm
L-histidine transport via diffusion (extracellular to periplasm)
L-isoleucine transport out via proton antiport (periplasm)
Myo-Inositol transport (transport mechanism unknown - evidence from biolog data)
Inositol transport via diffusion (extracellular to periplasm)
Inosine transport in via proton symport
Potassium transport in via proton symport (periplasm)
Potassium transport out via proton antiport (periplasm)
L-leucine transport in via sodium symport
Methanol transport via diffusion (extracellular to periplasm)
Magnesium transport in/out via permease (no H+)
Myo-inositol phosphate transport via diffusion (extracellular to periplasm)
Manganese (Mn+2) transport out via proton antiport (periplasm)
Manganese transport in via permease (no H+)
Manganese (Mn+2) transport via diffusion (extracellular to periplasm)
Sodium transport out via ABC system
Ammonia transport via diffusion (extracellular to periplasm)
Nickle (Ni+2) transport out via proton antiport (periplasm)
Nickel (+2) transport in via permease (no H+)
Oxygen transport via diffusion (extracellular to periplasm)
Phosphate transport via ABC system (uptake, periplasm)
Propanoyl phosphate transport (transport mechanism unknown - evidence from biolog data)
Pseudouridine transport via diffusion (extracellular to periplasm)
Riboflavin transport in via proton symport
L-Rhamnose transport (transport mechanism unknown - evidence from biolog data)
D sorbitol dehydrogenase D fructose producing
D sorbitol transport in via proton symport
L-threonine efflux transport via proton antiport (periplasm)
Thymine reversible transport via facilated diffusion
L valine reversible transport via proton symport
L-valine transport out via proton antiport (periplasm)
Zinc (Zn+2) transport out via proton antiport (periplasm)
Zinc (Zn+2) transport via diffusion (extracellular to periplasm)
